# CycleWise

> PCOS and cycle tracking companion — take a PCOS risk assessment, log periods and symptoms, and get personalized predictions and education.

CycleWise helps women understand their menstrual cycle and PCOS risk. The homepage offers an assessment anyone can take; the rest of the app (dashboard, tracker, calendar, education) is available after sign-in.

## Pages

- [Home / PCOS assessment](/): Take a free PCOS risk assessment and learn about the app.
- [Sign in / Sign up](/auth): Create an account or sign in to save assessments, log cycles, and view predictions.
